channel.title: GitHub Code Scanning on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub Code Scanning on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: CodeQL 2.26.0 adds Kotlin 2.4.0 support and AI prompt injection detection
item.description:
CodeQL 2.26.0 adds support for Kotlin 2.4.0 and introduces detection for AI prompt injection issues in code scanning. The release updates the static analysis engine used by GitHub code scanning.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: CodeQL 2.25.4 adds Swift 6.3.1 support, improvements to C# and Java, and more
item.description:
CodeQL 2.25.4 adds support for Swift 6.3.1 and includes improvements for C# and Java. The release also contains additional updates not detailed in the provided excerpt.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: CodeQL 2.25.3 adds Swift 6.3 support
item.description:
CodeQL 2.25.3 has been released with support for Swift 6.3. The note does not list any other changes.

  • Source: GitHub
